Dear Students,

The Indian School of Hospitality (ISH) is offering an exciting 5-Day Summer Program designed to provide students with an immersive introduction to the world of Hospitality and Culinary Arts.

The programme is interactive, engaging, and skill-focused, giving participants hands-on exposure to industry practices while experiencing campus life at ISH. Students will have the opportunity to:

  •  Learn new practical skills
  • Explore career opportunities in hospitality and culinary arts
  • Experience university campus life and industry exposure

Upcoming Programme Dates:
•9 – 13 June 2026

The programme aims to help students build unforgettable memories, develop new friendships, and gain a deeper understanding of their interests and aspirations in the hospitality and culinary field. Limited seats available 

Please refer brochure for your reference.

postLists.content:
Dear Students,

Greetings from GD Goenka Public School, Sector 48, Gurugram.

We are pleased to inform you that the school will be conducting *LEPTON (Learning Physics Through Nature)*, an engaging and concept-based physics program, on 18 May 2026 for students of Classes X to XII.

The session is designed as a two-hour interactive experience and will include:

Demonstrations based on real-life applications of physics.

A video-based quiz assessing observational and analytical skills

A guided discussion to deepen conceptual understanding

The program aims to strengthen students’ ability to connect physics concepts with everyday phenomena, thereby enhancing critical thinking and scientific aptitude.

*Special Opportunity – NAEST 2026:*

Students who perform well in the LEPTON session will have the opportunity to gain direct entry to the Preliminary Round of NAEST 2026 (National Anveshika Experimental Skill Test). Approximately one student per 50 participants will qualify through this route, while others may appear for the screening round separately.

*Important Instruction*:

Students are required to bring a cardboard (writing board) on the day of the session for the quiz.

We strongly encourage all students of Classes X–XII to participate in this enriching learning experience.

For any further information, please contact:

Ms Tanya Gera - tanyatanya@gdgoenka-gurgaon.com

Warm regards,

GDGPS, Sector 48.

Dear Students,
PFA the schedule for Artificial Intelligence PT1- Theory and Practical Assessment (15 marks each)

Theory- 8 May 2026 in 5th & 6th Slot
Practical - 20 May, 2026 in 1st & 2nd slot

Prepare well. All the Best !

Dear Students,
Please note that the AI Theory Examination is scheduled on 8 May 2026 during regular school hours. Attendance is mandatory for all students.

The syllabus remains as shared earlier. You are advised to thoroughly refer to the question banks of “Revisiting AI Project Cycle” and “ICT Skills – II”, as they are important for exam preparation. However, do not rely solely on question banks—ensure you go through the complete chapters for better understanding and clarity of concepts.

Prepare well.
Best wishes!

postLists.content:
Dear Students and Parents,

Kindly note-

The Harvard Undergraduate Science Olympiad — India Edition (2026–27).

Key Details

  • Program Brochure & Flyer: Attached
  • Eligibility: Grades 7–10
  • Registration Fee: INR 2360 per student (Including GST)
  • Deadline: 30th May 2026

Rewards and Recognition

  • Certificate of Participation: All participants will receive a certificate from the Harvard Undergraduate Science Olympiad
  • Top 100: Certificates, medals, and an opportunity to attend a 4-day in-person STEM bootcamp along with a written exam in January 2027
  • Top 10: Trophies, distinction medals, a scholarship from École Polytechnique, and a USD 200 scholarship for Learn with Leaders programs
  • Winner: A fully funded summer camp at Harvard University

Competition Structure

Round 1:

  • Online multiple-choice examination (3 hours) covering Biology, Earth Science, Chemistry, Physics, and Mathematics
  • Dates: 14th & 15th November 2026
  • Categories:
    • Category 1: Grades 7–8 (14th November 2026)
    • Category 2: Grades 9–10 (15th November 2026)

Round 2:

  • Top 100 students (50 per category) will advance to an in-person round in New Delhi (January 2027)
  • Includes participation in a 4-day STEM bootcamp conducted by Harvard mentors.

Regards

Dear all
Kindly find the attamachment of the handout and complete the written work

Dear Students*,

GoSharpener is excited to introduce the *Summer Internship Edition*, a unique opportunity designed to help you step beyond classrooms and engage with real-world challenges, sustainability initiatives, and impactful organizations.

*SUMMER INTERNSHIP EDITION– STUDENT OPPORTUNITY(🎓 9th-12th Only) | GoSharpener*

*How to Apply*

* Login in your account & Redeem internships with GoPoints

* *Go to this link:* https://gosharpener.com/market/category/25/Internship-Rewards

*Steps Incase of forgotten/new User ID & Password*

* Please fill required details here: https://forms.gle/88t2Mr3wUbjkaFEQ7

*Partner Organizations You Can Work With*

* Saahas – Waste management, circular economy

* WaterAid India – Water, sanitation, hygiene (WASH)

* PETA India – Animal welfare, advocacy

* Clean Choices Foundation – Sustainable lifestyles, waste reduction

* NCPD – Public policy, governance

* Peedu’s People (Delhi) – Community engagement, animal welfare

* Goonj – Rural development, circular economy

* Scrapshala – Upcycling, sustainable design

* Circology – Circular economy innovation

* CRY – Child rights, education, health

* Khejri Foundation – Tribal communities, conservation

* BNHS (Mumbai – In-person) – Biodiversity, wildlife conservation

* SOCH – Anth Hi Aarambh – Youth-led social change, awareness

Warm regards!

SkillUpgrad Internship Opportunity for Students (Grades 9–12)

SkillUpgrad, an initiative by MakeIntern, is offering one-month online internship programs designed to help students develop future-ready skills through practical and engaging learning.

Program Details:

  • Duration: 1 month (12 sessions, 1.5 hours each)
  • Mode: 100% online (live + recorded sessions)
  • Includes: Hands-on projects, assignments, internship report, and certification

Available Programs:

  • Cyber Security & Ethical Hacking
  • Power BI & Data Visualization
  • Teen Start-Up Challenge (Entrepreneurship)
  • App Design (No-Code Development)
  • AI & Ethics

Certification:
Students will receive both an Internship Certificate and a Course Completion Certificate.

Fee: ₹2000 for one month

Students interested in technology, creativity, and innovation are encouraged to participate. Schools can also request customized batches and projects.
For More information pls refer the doc attached.

The National Anveshika Experimental Skill Test 2026 (NAEST 2026) is conducted annually by the National Anveshika Network of India (NANI), a unit of the Indian Association of Physics Teachers, under the guidance of Prof H. C. Verma.

Students of Secondary and Senior Secondary classes are invited to participate in this initiative aligned with NEP, focusing on joyful, experiential, and competency-based learning.

There is no participation fee.

Summer Program at Pearl Academy

Students of Classes IX to XII have an opportunity to participate in a 10-day Summer Program offered by Pearl Academy, designed to introduce them to diverse creative disciplines through an immersive, on-campus experience.

Program Overview
The Summer Program enables students to explore fields such as AI, Business, Fashion, Styling, Interior & Product Design, and Communication. The focus is on experiential learning, creative exploration, and developing a foundational portfolio.

Eligibility
Classes IX – XII

Program Fee
₹15,000 + 18% GST
(Non-refundable)

Delhi Campus Details

  • Dates: 1st June to 12th June 2026
  • Duration: 10 Days
  • Time: 9:30 am – 3:30 pm
  • Venue: Pearl Academy Delhi West Campus

Registration Details

  • Last Date (Delhi Campus): 15th May 2026
  • Registration Link: https://www.pearlacademy.com/events/summer-at-pearl/2026

Program Highlights

  • Hands-on creative workshops
  • Mentorship from industry experts
  • Collaboration with like-minded peers
  • Final showcase of student work
  • Certificate of participation

This program provides students with early exposure to creative career pathways while strengthening their practical skills and creative thinking.

Dear Parents,

Kindly note that ESTP classes will not be conducted on 23rd and 24th April due to the Sports Fiesta in the school.

We appreciate your understanding and cooperation.

Thank you

GDGPS

postLists.content:
Dear Students,



Programme LEAD (Learning, Engagement, Action, and Development) – a dynamic Summer School at TERI School of Advanced Studies (TERI SAS), organized in collaboration with The Energy and Resources Institute (TERI). This immersive programme offers students a unique opportunity to interact with leading researchers and academics in the field of sustainability. Through a series of interactive workshops and engaging activities, participants will explore cutting-edge areas such as:



Data Science



Carbon Markets



Economics



Biotech



Climate Change



Design Thinking



Business



Sustainable Development Goals



We believe Programme LEAD will not only enrich your academic perspective but also inspire meaningful action through interdisciplinary learning.



Details for registration and fees may be found here:---- https://www.terisas.ac.in/summerschool-2026/

Gentle Reminder

Inter-House Swimming Competition

Dear Students ,kindly ensure that you bring the consent slip duly signed by your parents. The consent form has already been uploaded on NLP.

House Meeting Coordinators

GD Goenka University Summer School 2026



Dear Students,



We are pleased to share an exciting opportunity from GD Goenka University — the Summer School 2026, scheduled from 28 May to 4 June 2026, for students aged 13–18 years.



This 8-day residential programme, “Innovate, Design & Thrive: Shaping Futures for Life,” offers a platform to explore future-focused disciplines through hands-on and experiential learning.



Programme Highlights:




  • 5+ hours of daily practical learning in AI, Aerospace, Design, and Culinary Arts

  • Access to advanced labs, workshops, and experiential projects

  • Soft skills development through theatre, music, calligraphy, fashion, and event management

  • Leadership exposure through planning the Culmination Day & Gala Dinner

  • Recreational outings and residential campus experience

  • Certificate upon successful completion



Courses Offered:




  • Brain & Bots – AI & Aerospace Innovation

  • Designing Futures – Creativity & Business with AI (UID)

  • Sustainable Hospitality – Culinary Arts, Flairology & Sustainability (in collaboration with Le Cordon Bleu India)



Set within a NAAC A+ accredited campus, the programme ensures quality infrastructure, experienced faculty, and a safe residential environment.



Programme Fee: ₹45,000 (inclusive of accommodation, meals, and academic materials)



Additional Benefits:




  • Early bird discount on registrations

  • 50% Summer School fee refund for students enrolling at GD Goenka University in 2026*



Registration Link: https://forms.gle/3MZJYaLPgqrFYrEa8



Students interested in exploring new-age career pathways and gaining practical exposure are encouraged to apply.

postLists.content:
Dear Students,



We are pleased to share an exciting opportunity offered by ThinkStartup — the Young CEO Program, a 4-day entrepreneurship bootcamp hosted at Research & Innovation Park, IIT Delhi.



This program is ideal for students interested in innovation, entrepreneurship, and solving real-world problems.



Program Details:




  • Venue: IIT Delhi (R&I Park)

  • Duration: 4 Days

  • Timings: 9:30 AM – 4:30 PM



Available Batches:




  • 29 May – 1 June

  • 2 June – 5 June

  • 26 June – 29 June



Key Highlights:




  • Develop and present a business idea

  • Pitch in a Shark Tank–style finale

  • Learn from startup founders and industry experts

  • Certificate in Entrepreneurship (with TIDES IIT Roorkee)

  • Opportunity for recognition and portfolio building



Apply Here: https://bit.ly/K_NCR_MARCH26



Interested students are encouraged to explore this opportunity and apply at the earliest.
